kill_fact: No kill_fact found. Every load-bearing figure verifies against primary sources, and the bear's core claim — the AI-optical re-rate is already in the tape at a peak multiple — is independently CONFIRMED and is in fact harsher than the debate stated: GLW is up ~256% over the trailing year (~98% YTD) into an all-time-high close of $207.96 (May 14 2026), now ~$195, with a TRAILING P/E ~85x (electronics-industry avg ~33x). The bear thesis (fired catalysts, single-shared-AI-capex factor, FCF lagging EPS, negative risk/reward at top of a quadruple) survives the kill-check intact; verdict PASS/own-on-washout holds.
corrections: (1) The debate hedges that the hyperscaler LTAs MIGHT be take-or-pay/non-cancellable demand. Primary disclosures REFUTE that bull-friendly read and CONFIRM the bear's: they are multi-year agreements 'valued UP TO' figures (Meta 'up to $6B'; Q1 call: two more 'similar in size and duration'), i.e. ceilings/intent, not take-or-pay floors — so customer-concentration + capex-digestion optionality sits with the hyperscalers, strengthening the bear. (2) The NVIDIA item is materially BIGGER/more concrete than the bull described — on May 6 2026 NVIDIA announced an investment of UP TO $3.2B IN Corning plus 3 new NC/TX factories and a 10x US optical-capacity expansion (CNBC, 5/6/26). This deepens the moat (strategic co-investment/lock-in), which CUTS AGAINST the bear's 'commoditizing component' jab but does NOT rescue the valuation/already-fired-catalyst core of the bear case. (3) Official Springboard targets are $35B high-confidence / $40B internal annualized run-rate by end-2030, with $20B by end-2026 and $27B by end-2028 — consistent with the debate's numbers (corning.com, 5/5/26).
evidence: Corning IR, 'Corning Announces Strong First-Quarter 2026 Financial Results' (Q1-26, sales $4.35B +18%, core EPS $0.70 +30%, Optical $1.846B +36%, op margin 20.2%, gross 39.1%, adj. FCF $188M; two added hyperscaler LTAs 'similar in size/duration' to Meta up-to-$6B) — investor.corning.com, 4/2026

Corning news release, 'Corning Upgrades and Extends Springboard Plan' ($20B run-rate end-2026 @15% CAGR re-accelerating to 19% CAGR, $27B end-2028, $35B high-confidence / $40B internal end-2030) — corning.com / businesswire.com, 5/5/2026

Amazon, 'Amazon announces agreement with Corning... 1,000 advanced manufacturing jobs in North Carolina' (multiyear, multibillion-dollar optical fiber/cable/connectivity supply deal) — aboutamazon.com, 6/8/2026

CNBC, 'Nvidia to invest up to $3.2 billion in Corning... 3 new factories' + 10x US optical capacity (separate from Meta) — cnbc.com, 5/6/2026; valuation: stockanalysis.com / gurufocus GLW ~+256% 1yr, trailing P/E ~85x, ATH close $207.96 (5/14/26), ~$195 (6/18/26)
